description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10 Docker image and defines two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs the command npm install, caches the node_modules/ directory, and publishes node_modules/ as an artifact that expires in 1 week. In the test stage add a test job that runs npm test and a validate job that runs npm run validate; both jobs use the node:10 image and are tagged with docker and shared runners. Enable a global cache for the path node_modules/.
